name: Bug Report

labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to module / notebook '...'
2. Run cell / script '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

A clear and concise description of what actually happened. Include the full error message or traceback if applicable.

```
Paste error output here
```

## Module Number Affected

<!-- e.g. Module 3 – First-Level GLM Analysis -->

## Environment

- **OS:** <!-- e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 13, Windows 11 -->
- **Python version:** <!-- e.g. 3.10.12 -->
- **Conda environment:** <!-- Attach or paste the output of `conda env export` or `pip freeze` -->

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or information that may help diagnose the problem.
